name: STM32H753 TFBGA100
description: Generated from the STM32H753 alternate-function workbook and STM32H753VI datasheet for STM32H753 TFBGA100. This definition models the TFBGA100 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32H753 devices pair an Arm Cortex-M7 core running at up to 480 MHz with 2 Mbytes of flash memory, 864 Kbytes of user SRAM, and 4 Kbytes of backup SRAM. This package definition exposes 70 peripheral blocks covering 12 timers, a high-resolution timer, 5 low-power timers, 9 serial ports, 5 SPI controllers, 4 I2S interfaces, 4 I2C controllers, 4 serial audio interfaces, 2 SDMMC host interfaces, 2 FDCAN controllers, an Ethernet MAC interface, 2 USB OTG interfaces, 3 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, 2 on-chip operational amplifiers, 2 ultra-low-power comparators, DFSDM inputs, a digital camera interface, LCD-TFT display signals, a Quad-SPI memory interface, an S/PDIF receiver, a single-wire protocol master interface, and an MDIOS slave interface.

peripherals.label: ADC1
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 14 analog input channels and differential INP/INN signal pairs.

peripherals.label: ADC2
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 12 analog input channels and differential INP/INN signal pairs.

peripherals.label: ADC3
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 4 analog input channels and differential INP/INN signal pairs.

peripherals.label: CEC
peripherals.description: HDMI-CEC single-wire interface.

peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input, a negative input, and a comparator output.

peripherals.label: COMP2
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input, a negative input, and a comparator output.

peripherals.label: DAC1
peripherals.description: Digital-to-analog converter with 2 analog output channels.
